mapper.sql: aom.id, aom.dept_id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.attribute1, aom.attribute2, aom.attribute3, aom.attribute4, aom.enabled_flag, aom.create_by, aom.create_time, aom.update_by, aom.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.total_number as ${tAlias}_total_number, ${tAlias}.average_overtime_hour as ${tAlias}_average_overtime_hour, ${tAlias}.system_limit_hour as ${tAlias}_system_limit_hour, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_overtime_mangement (id, dept_id, total_number, average_overtime_hour, system_limit_hour, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{averageOvertimeHour,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{systemLimitHour,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_overtime_mangement set dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_number = #{totalNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, average_overtime_hour = #{averageOvertimeHour,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, system_limit_hour = #{systemLimitHour,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE ac_overtime_mangement SET total_number = ( SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT pe.name ) AS userNumber FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE fd.id = ac_overtime_mangement.dept_id AND ( pej.attribute1 IS NOT NULL OR (pej.attribute1 is NULL AND pej.attribute2 is NULL AND pej.attribute3 is NULL AND pej.attribute4 is NULL AND pej.attribute5 is NULL)) AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' -- AND pe.administration_category= 'NDVC' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.employee_type = '正式员工' ), system_limit_hour = ( SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT pe.name ) * average_overtime_hour FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE fd.id = ac_overtime_mangement.dept_id AND ( pej.attribute1 IS NOT NULL OR (pej.attribute1 is NULL AND pej.attribute2 is NULL AND pej.attribute3 is NULL AND pej.attribute4 is NULL AND pej.attribute5 is NULL)) AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' -- AND pe.administration_category= 'NDVC' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.employee_type = '正式员工' ) -- WHERE -- dept_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.dept_level = '科室' AND fd.enabled_flag = 1 )
update ac_overtime_mangement set total_number = #{totalNumber},system_limit_hour = (#{totalNumber} * average_overtime_hour) where id = #{id}
update ac_overtime_mangement_backup set total_number = #{totalNumber},system_limit_hour = (#{totalNumber} * average_overtime_hour) where id = #{id}
mapper.select: where aom.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by id

SELECT DISTINCT aom.id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id, -- fd.dept_name AS dept_name, aom.enabled_flag, ( CASE
WHEN ( ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) IS NULL OR ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) = '' ) THEN fd.dept_name ELSE fd.dept_name + '---' + ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) END ) AS dept_name FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON aom.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id WHERE 1 =1 -- select aom.id,aom.total_number,aom.average_overtime_hour,aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aom.enabled_flag -- FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom -- INNER join fnd_dept fd on aom.dept_id=fd.id -- ORDER BY aom.id

select aom.id,aom.total_number,aom.average_overtime_hour,aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aom.enabled_flag FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER join fnd_dept fd on aom.dept_id=fd.id where aom.id=#{id} and aom.dept_id=#{deptId}

SELECT DISTINCT aom.id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id, fd.dept_name AS dept_name, aom.enabled_flag, (SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name) AS parentName FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON aom.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id -- WHERE -- fd.dept_name LIKE #{deptName} -- select aom.id,aom.total_number,aom.average_overtime_hour,aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aom.enabled_flag -- FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom -- INNER join fnd_dept fd on aom.dept_id=fd.id -- WHERE dept_name LIKE #{deptName}

select DISTINCT fd.parent_id,fd.id,pej.job_name,pej.job_id FROM fnd_dept fd JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.work_card=#{workCard} AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1

select * from pm_employee_job pej left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id left join fnd_dept fd on fd.id=pej.dept_id where pe.work_card=#{workCard} and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

select aom.id,aom.total_number,aom.average_overtime_hour,aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aom.enabled_flag FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER join fnd_dept fd on aom.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.id=#{deptId}

select aom.id,aom.total_number,aom.average_overtime_hour,aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aom.enabled_flag FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER join fnd_dept fd on aom.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.parent_id in (#{deptId}) ORDER BY aom.id

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.id = #{deptId} order by aomb.backup_time desc

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.id = #{deptId} and aomb.backup_time between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} order by aomb.backup_time desc

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.id=#{deptId} and fd.id LIKE #{checkDeptId} order by aomb.backup_time desc

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.parent_id in (#{deptId}) and fd.id LIKE #{checkDeptId} order by aomb.backup_time desc

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.id=#{deptId} and fd.id = #{checkDeptId} and aomb.backup_time between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} order by aomb.backup_time desc

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE fd.parent_id in (#{deptId}) and fd.id = #{checkDeptId} and aomb.backup_time between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} order by aomb.backup_time desc

SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT pe.name ) AS userNumber FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE ( fd.id = #{dept_id} ) -- (fd.dept_name LIKE '%总装车间%' OR pej.attribute3 LIKE '%总装车间%') AND ( pej.attribute1 IS NOT NULL OR ( pej.attribute1 IS NULL AND pej.attribute2 IS NULL AND pej.attribute3 IS NULL AND pej.attribute4 IS NULL AND pej.attribute5 IS NULL ) ) AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' -- AND pe.administration_category= 'NDVC' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.leave_flag = 0

SELECT DISTINCT aom.id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id, fd.dept_name AS dept_name, aom.enabled_flag, (SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name) AS attribute1 FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON aom.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 1 aom.id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id, aom.enabled_flag, fd.dept_level, -- 动态拼接 deptName COALESCE( -- 如果group_name不为空，则使用它，否则尝试使用section_name和dept_name CONCAT( NULLIF( CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE '' END, '' ), '-', NULLIF( CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd1.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd.dept_name ELSE '' END, '' ), '-', NULLIF( CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd2.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd1.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE NULL END, NULL ) ), -- 如果group_name为空，则尝试使用section_name和dept_name CONCAT( NULLIF( CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE '' END, '' ), '-', NULLIF( CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd2.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd1.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE NULL END, NULL ) ), -- 如果前两个都为空，则只使用dept_name CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN pej.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd2.dept_name ELSE NULL END ) AS dept_name FROM ac_overtime_mangement aom INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON aom.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id = pej.employee_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd1 ON fd1.id = fd.parent_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = fd1.parent_id WHERE pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND (fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' OR fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' OR fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%') AND fd.id = #{deptId}

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id

select aomb.id,aomb.total_number,aomb.average_overtime_hour,aomb.system_limit_hour, aomb.dept_id,fd.dept_name as dept_name, aomb.enabled_flag,aomb.backup_time FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aomb INNER join fnd_dept fd on aomb.dept_id=fd.id WHERE aomb.backup_time between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} order by aomb.backup_time desc

SELECT DISTINCT aom.id, aom.total_number, aom.average_overtime_hour, aom.system_limit_hour, aom.dept_id, -- fd.dept_name AS dept_name, aom.enabled_flag, ( CASE
WHEN ( ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) IS NULL OR ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) = '' ) THEN fd.dept_name ELSE fd.dept_name + '---' + ( SELECT TOP 1 pej.attribute1 FROM fnd_dept parentDept INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = parentDept.id WHERE parentDept.dept_name = fd.dept_name ) END ) AS dept_name FROM ac_overtime_mangement_backup aom INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON aom.dept_id = fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND aom.create_time >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) -- 当月的第一天 AND aom.create_time < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) -- 下个月的第一天（即本月的最后一天）
